title: spiraea × reflexa
intro: Spiraea × reflexa, also known as Mead's or Bridger spiraea, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Spiraea betulifolia and Spiraea douglasii. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Spiraea × reflexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or poultice to utilize its medicinal properties.
